creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
I build ports from source and prefer not to compile and install stuff I don't actually want to use.

Having the libetpan option in the official ports tree is not essential for me, I use local patches anyway. I mainly submitted the patch based on the assumption that it might be useful for other users as well.

I agree that the majority of Claws-Mail users are unlikely to care about this option, but that's probably true for other options as well.
